title: Default Skinpack
description: Adds Default Skin into Legacy4J as a Skinpack
body:
# Default Skin Pack
Default Skin Pack is a resource pack designed for [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) an addon for [Legacy 4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) which adds all the vanilla default skins as a 'Old School' Skin Pack

This pack adds Both Slim and Wide Skins

# How to use:
- Simply add this pack to your resource packs and enable it.
-  Enjoy. :)
